message:
fix(lab): harden dual-run resource surface counter comparison

The previous compare_resource_surface() silently defaulted missing live
counters to 0 and used only the lab-side tolerance, masking divergences
where the live observable was missing a counter entirely or had a
different tolerance configured.

Fixes:
- Report missing-in-live counters as explicit mismatches instead of
  silently comparing against 0
- Compare both lab and live tolerance declarations and report when
  they disagree (tolerance metadata mismatch is a real divergence)
- Rename local variable from `tolerance` to `lab_tolerance` for
  clarity since both sides are now inspected

Tests added:
- compare_resource_counter_missing_in_live_fails
- compare_resource_tolerance_mismatch_fails

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
